channel.title: Devops+ai on Sujith Quintelier
channel.description: Recent content in Devops+ai on Sujith Quintelier

item.title: devops+ai: 🔥Designing Specialized Agents - Model Selection, Tool Scoping, and Output Contracts🔥
item.description:
The article frames specialized agents as being given a limited toolbox and clear instructions. It points to three design areas: choosing the model, scoping the tools it can use, and defining output contracts.

  • Source: Let’s do DevOps

item.title: devops+ai: 🔥The Orchestrator Pattern - Turning CLAUDE.md Into an Autonomous Agent Team Pipeline🔥
item.description:
The article presents an “orchestrator pattern” for using CLAUDE.md to coordinate multiple autonomous agents across the software delivery lifecycle. It frames the approach as a way to delegate SDLC tasks to agent pipelines.

  • Source: Let’s do DevOps

item.title: devops+ai: 🔥Sending Email from Claude Code with Zero Dependencies🔥
item.description:
The article describes sending email from Claude Code using only shell tools, specifically curl and awk, with no extra dependencies. It frames the approach as a lightweight, command-line workflow for composing and sending email from the terminal.

  • Source: Let’s do DevOps

item.title: devops+ai: 🔥Agentic AI Email Bot on AWS Bedrock AgentCore: Building the Thread, Sending the Reply, and Operating in Production (2/2)🔥
item.description:
The article notes that making email-safe HTML is nontrivial and effectively requires treating it as a separate format from normal web HTML.

  • Source: Let’s do DevOps

item.title: devops+ai: 🔥Agentic AI Email Bot on AWS Bedrock AgentCore: Full Architecture and O365 Integration (1/2)🔥
item.description:
The page is an article introducing an agentic AI email bot built on AWS Bedrock AgentCore with Microsoft O365 integration. The provided excerpt is only a brief tagline and does not include implementation details.

  • Source: Let’s do DevOps

item.title: devops+ai: AgentCore: Deployment, Operations, and Lessons Learned (4/4) 🔥
item.description:
The provided content is only a short teaser and does not include substantive release or changelog details. It appears to be a post about AgentCore deployment, operations, and lessons learned, but no具体 information is available from the excerpt.

  • Source: Let’s do DevOps
